entries.decision: Gaps move to .lume/gaps/ with NO legacy repo-root fallback
entries.rationale: State co-location wins over the original root-level one-file-PR discoverability argument: .lume/gaps/ is still a one-file PR at a well-known path, and lume controls both ends of the scan. No repo has any gap records yet (gaps/ does not exist here or in tredl), so there is nothing to migrate and a fallback would be dead code. Operator confirmed dropping the fallback.
